items.title: Rosalía Shares Tour Essay, Delights Ween Fans, Gets Shoutout From Mick Jagger
items.summary: Last year's epic Lux earned Rosalía attention from all sorts of listeners, including Mick Jagger, who recently told GQ that he's a fan: "That was something really conceptual, really interesting. And she really pulled it off, and I really admire her for doing it." She also earned attention from Ween fans for posting a vinyl copy of 1994's Chocolate And Cheese on her Instagram story.

items.title: Bad Bunny Brought Out Damon Albarn For Two Gorillaz Songs In London
items.summary: Bad Bunny's world tour brought him to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London for a pair of shows over the weekend. As Sunday night's gig was drawing to a close, the global superstar brought out a local legend, Gorillaz mastermind Damon Albarn. The former Blur frontman joined Bad Bunny for two songs: "Tormenta," their collaboration from Gorillaz' 2023 album Cracker Island, and "Clint Eastwood," the iconic single from Gorillaz' 2001 self-titled debut.

items.title: Bob Dylan Mysteriously Splits With Two Tour Guitarists
items.summary: Bob Dylan has been enjoying his latest tour leg, busting out deep cuts like "Baby, Will You Be My Baby" and "I Shall Be Released." But something is going on with his band. The post Bob Dylan Mysteriously Splits With Two Tour Guitarists appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: String of European music festivals and gigs left devastated by extreme weather: “The unthinkable has happened”
items.summary: Festival organisers speak to NME about the difficulties in adapting to extreme weather, as severe heat and storms forced the cancellation and evacuation of events in France, Belgium and The Netherlands – while UK shows also baked in record-breaking temperatures The post String of European music festivals and gigs left devastated by extreme weather: “The unthinkable has happened” appeared first on NME.
